channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Visual novel The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten: Memorial Vacation announced for Switch 2, Switch
item.content:encoded:
• Switch
  • Switch 2

Due out on July 23 in Japan.

MAGES. has announced The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten: Memorial Vacation, a visual novel based on the popular television anime. It will launch for Switch 2 and Switch on July 23 in Japan. The Switch 2 version will be a digital-only release.

The game will be priced as follows:

  • Physical (Switch)
    • Standard Edition (7,480 yen)
      • A copy of the game
    • Limited Edition (12,980 yen)
      • A copy of the game
      • Acrylic stands (x2)
      • Clear bookmarks (x4)
      • Original drama CD
      • Game original soundtrack CD
  • Digital (Switch 2, Switch)
    • Standard Edition (6,380 yen)
      • A copy of the game
    • Digital Deluxe Edition (9,680 yen)
      • A copy of the game
      • Digital soundtrack (a digital application version of the game original soundtrack CD)
      • Digital drama (a digital application version of the original drama CD)

Here are the first details:

About

The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten: Memorial Vacation is a fully voiced text adventure game in which you progress by reading text.

The story is set during the first summer vacation since Amane Fujimiya and Mahiru Shiina started dating. After winning a supermarket raffle, the two take a trip to Okinawa together with their classmates Itsuki Akasawa and Chitose Shirakawa.

The tourist attractions the four visit in Okinawa include real-world locations, where events unique to Okinawa unfold.

With immersive visuals and storytelling, players will feel as though they are truly traveling through Okinawa alongside the four characters.

A Branching Story Unfolds Depending on the Travel Plan You Choose

The story unfolds from Amane’s perspective.

The game features a multi-story structure in which the narrative branches depending on which travel plan proposed by each of the four characters you choose, changing the locations visited and how the story progresses.

In every route, scenes unique to Okinawa and a bittersweet, heart-pounding story unfold.

A total of eight different endings are available.

Fully Voiced

The story is fully voiced, allowing players to immerse themselves into the world and story. The cast includes:

  • Amane Fujimiya (voiced by Taito Ban)
  • Mahiru Shiina (voiced by Manaka Iwami)
  • Itsuki Akasawa (voiced by Taku Yashiro)
  • Chitose Shirakawa (voiced by Haruka Shiraishi)

Synopsis

“Angel.”

Amane happens to live next door to the most beautiful girl in school, known by that nickname.

As they spend time together, their relationship evolves from “neighbors” to “boyfriend and girlfriend.”

And now their very first summer vacation has arrived.

After luckily winning tickets for a trip to Okinawa, their summer story is about to begin…

View the first screenshots at the gallery. Visit the official website here.

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/visual-novel-the-angel-next-door-spoils-me-rotten-memorial-vacation-announced-for-switch-2-switch
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Guilty Gear: Strive version 2.00 update, Season 5 DLC characters Jam Kuradoberi and Robo=Ky announced
item.content:encoded:
• Arcade
  • PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox One
  • Xbox Series

Version 2.00 update and Jam Kuradoberi due out on April 9.

Arc System Works has announced the version 2.00 update for fighting game Guilty Gear: Strive, which will launch on April 9 alongside Season 5 downloadable content character Jam Kuradoberi.

Robo=Ky will follow as an additional downloadable content character this summer, followed by an unannounced character this winter and another unannounced character in spring 2027.

Season Pass 5 will also consist of the additional battle stage “Cradled by the Four Beasts,” additional character colors (seven colors for the four new characters, totaling at 28 colors), the wanted poster skin “Street,” and the battle user interface skin “Vintage Metal.”

The version 2.0 update will include major battle changes, including the new battle mechanics “Wild Assault” and “Counter Blitz,” as well as new special moves, the new play reward “Haunted,” accessories and outfits, battle user interface skins, short stories, and the seasonal reward system “Blazing Pass,” which will be available in May.

Guilty Gear: Strive is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam.

Watch a new set of trailers below.

Version 2.00 Update Trailer

English

DLC Character Jam Kuradoberi Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/guilty-gear-strive-version-2-00-update-season-5-dlc-characters-jam-kuradoberi-and-roboky-announced

item.title: Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising version 2.60 update announced, including new DLC character
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5

Seemingly Id from Granblue Fantasy: Relink.

Publisher Cygames and developer Arc System Works have announced the Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising version 2.60 update, which will consist of a new downloadable content character, new system mechanic, and more.

The new character was not named, but the teaser image suggests it will be Id, an original character that debuted in Granblue Fantasy: Relink.

The version 2.60 update will include the following contents:

  • New downloadable content character
  • New stage
  • New system mechanic
  • Adjustments to system mechanics
  • Character adjustments
  • New costume
  • …And more!

Further information will be announced at a later date.

Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising is available now for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/granblue-fantasy-versus-rising-version-2-60-update-announced-including-new-dlc-character
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes new DLC character announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch

Here is your first look.

Publisher Arc System Works and developer French-Bread will release a new downloadable content character for fighting game Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes in 2026, the companies announced.

A teaser trailer featuring a silhouette of the new character and a 2026 release window was released alongside the announcement. Further details were not announced.

Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes is available now for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam.

Watch the teaser trailer below.

2026 New Character Reveal Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/under-night-in-birth-ii-sysceles-new-dlc-character-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Digimon Story: Time Stranger large-scale expansion DLC announced
item.content:encoded:
Publisher Bandai Namco and developer Media.Vision have announced a large-scale expansion downloadable content for Digimon Story: Time Stranger. It will launch in 2027.

Bandai Namco also announced the results of the 139th Digimon Referendum, a fan vote that answers the question, “Which Digimon would you like to train or hope to see play an active role in future Digimon games?” In this vote, user were able to chose one of 35 Digimon selected by management. The top 10 results are as follows:

  1. Gammamon
  2. Loogamon
  3. Kazemon
  4. Gumdramon
  5. Pulsemon
  6. Herissmon
  7. Terriermon Assistant
  8. Meicoomon
  9. Ludomon
  10. Gekkomon

Speaking on the expansion downloadable content, Digimon Story: Time Stranger producer Ryosuke Hara said, “We’re already in development, and while not everything from the Digi Referendum results we just announced will be making it in, after taking into consideration the world-building for this new expansion [downloadable content] and future Digimon games, we will be partially reflecting those results. As to what will get reflected, please look forward to follow-up announcements in the coming days.”

Hara continued, “It’s a bit far off, I know, but I can’t tell you just what kind of content it will be just yet. However, there is one thing I can share, and that’s that [Aegiomon voice actor Mutsumi] Tamura-san will be working hard with us again.”

Tsujimon, one of the hosts of today’s Digimon Con 2026 where this information was announced, asked Hara, “So the fact that Aegiomon will make an appearance means that from a story’s standpoint, it would have to be a parallel world, or in the future… I doubt you could answer us for that now, could you, Hara-san?”

To that, Hara answered, “What an excellent line of reasoning. A really excellent question! And that’s all I have to say.”

Digimon Story: Time Stranger is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam, and is coming to Switch 2 and Switch on July 9 in Japan and July 10 worldwide.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/digimon-story-time-stranger-large-scale-expansion-dlc-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
